---
title: "How-To Guides"
---
 
Task-oriented recipes for common use cases.

## Available Guides

*Coming soon - these guides are planned:*

### Parameter Sweeps

- Defining complex multi-parameter sweeps
- Using YAML configuration files
- Range specifications with NumPy

### Remote Execution

- Running simulations on Josh Cloud
- API key configuration
- Remote vs local execution

### Advanced Queries

- Custom SQL patterns for analysis
- Spatial and temporal filtering
- Aggregation strategies

### R Integration

- Using ggplot2 with joshpy results
- Reticulate configuration
- Publication-quality figures

## Contributing

Have a how-to guide to contribute? Open a PR on [GitHub](https://github.com/SchmidtDSE/joshpy)!
